caption: An elderly man with white hair and glasses stands behind a podium, delivering a presentation in a room with brown window blinds in the background. He wears a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt featuring a colorful pattern and a decorative collar. A microphone is positioned in front of him, and his hands rest on the podium. The podium features a logo with a purple graphic and the text "CORCA" printed on a sign to the right. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members' heads are visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, shifting his gaze slightly and moving his hands as he speaks. The lighting and setting remain constant, with the man continuing his address while the audience remains attentive.
